subsidyType: multi-year utility replacement program that replaces customer-owned lead service lines free of charge
publicSideCovered: yes M.U.D. coordinates utility-side work through the district program
privateSideCovered: yes customer-owned lead service lines are replaced free of charge
propertyRules: properties with lead service lines are prioritized through the district map and neighborhood rollout schedule
contractorRules: M.U.D. controls contractors and outside contractor scheduling is not part of the program
